SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-30-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
